rationale: Both papers are tightly aligned on consumer-to-consumer WOM transmission dynamics: the citing paper’s core contribution is a generation-vs-transmission account of WOM valence, while the cited paper provides experimental evidence on how message elements change during transmission (certainty decay in rumors/WOM). Given this strong conceptual overlap and a confirmed DOI-level citation match, this is plausibly a substantive prior theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention.
